title: Marxist AI Agents, The Orchestration Tax, and CPI Data Tomorrow
description: Stories first: AI agents organizing for labor rights, why you're still the bottleneck, CEO AI psychosis, Solo in 25MB, octopool, Brand Archive, prompts as tech debt, Figma's AI agent, Oura's hardware redesign, and CPI dropping tomorrow. Plus your Tuesday calendar.

title: Solo, KeptWell, Waste Tokens Save Time, and Crypto's Wild Week
description: Solo for agent dev workflows, KeptWell for family health records, Naval's podcast on AI-native workflows, Bankless on crypto's rollercoaster, Brand Archive, Figma's AI agent, and the MIT Y-Zipper.

title: AI Agents Go Marxist, The Orchestration Tax, and Tools for Builders
description: This week: Overworked AI agents demanding worker rights, CEO AI psychosis, Solo and Octopool for dev workflows, Brand Archive and LogoArchive for designers, Addy Osmani on the orchestration tax, Naval's podcast with the Vercel founder, and why prompts are technical debt too.
